overall.description: Cinematic gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a drive through the Badlands desert highway. The scene features distinctive rusted industrial windmill turbines and circular wind structures scattered across the arid landscape. The camera travels along the asphalt road, ventures off-road through cacti and Joshua trees, then returns to the roadside, encountering light vehicle traffic and abandoned cars.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert highway with industrial windmill farm

events.description: blue sedan enters from left and drives past on the highway
camera turns left and exits the paved highway onto desert terrain

agents.ego_description: driving along the desert highway before turning off onto the sandy shoulder to explore the badlands

notable_agents.action: blue sedan driving past on the highway from left to right

entered.detail: paved two-lane highway with white lane markings
tall industrial windmill with rusted blades and checkered pattern
circular metal windmill structure with rotating rings
overhead electrical transmission lines spanning the highway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunlit desert highway with distinctive industrial windmill structures visible in the distance. The camera drives forward along the asphalt road, passing beneath power lines as a blue sedan drives by. Near the end of the segment, the camera turns left off the paved road onto the sandy desert terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert badlands with saguaro cacti and Joshua trees

agents.ego_description: traversing the desert off-road, navigating between saguaro cacti and Joshua trees toward the windmill structures

entered.detail: sandy desert terrain with sparse dry vegetation
tall green saguaro cacti with multiple arms

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through the open desert badlands, leaving the highway behind. It navigates between tall saguaro cacti and Joshua trees while approaching the large rusted windmill towers. The industrial windmills grow larger as the camera advances across the sandy terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway shoulder with concrete barriers and abandoned vehicles

events.description: rusted car drives past on the highway from right to left
vehicle approaches from distance and passes by on the highway

agents.ego_description: driving parallel to the highway along the dirt shoulder, passing red and white barriers and abandoned vehicles

notable_agents.action: rusted car driving along the highway
distant car approaching on the highway

entered.detail: concrete traffic barriers with red and white stripes lining the road
rusted abandoned green vehicle partially buried in sand and vegetation
large digital billboard displaying red BUY advertisement
paved highway reappearing on the right side

segments.scene_description: The camera returns to the highway area, now driving along the dirt shoulder beside red and white concrete barriers. It passes very close to a massive rusted windmill tower and an abandoned green car partially buried in the sand. Vehicle traffic continues to pass by on the asphalt road to the right, including a rusted car and a distant approaching vehicle.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a sunlit highway into the rugged desert interior before returning to the roadside. It begins by driving forward along an asphalt road beneath power lines as a blue sedan passes, before turning left off the pavement and onto the sandy terrain. As the camera navigates the open badlands, it weaves between tall saguaro cacti and Joshua trees, drawing closer to towering, rusted industrial windmills. The scene then shifts back toward the highway, gliding along a dirt shoulder lined with red and white concrete barriers. Finally, the camera passes a massive windmill tower and a partially buried green car while other vehicles continue to flow along the adjacent road.
